description: CompositionGrey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed crew-neck with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, graphic print on the front and swoosh logo towards the left hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry cleanDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not iron on print or embroideryThe manchester united football Club Core T-shirt from nike is an exclusive prodcut created for hard core Man Utd fans. The classic, comfortable Fit is complemented by the cool grunge graphic that shows the letters Man Utd emerging from the sea. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a strong, aggressive look.
